Valereum are using the ZIGChain blockchain infra for tokenisation, are they not?

ZIGChain uses a Proof-of-Stake (PoS) system, where validators stake ZIG to help secure the blockchain and process transactions. Validators must stake ZIG to participate. Attacks (double-spends, chain reorgs, censorship) are prevented mainly because they’re financially expensive. Honest validators earn ZIG; dishonest ones risk having ZIG slashed.

So the chain’s security is proportional to the market value of ZIG. If ZIG heads towards zero VLRM's tokenisation model becomes completely insecure.

So while VLRM might not directly be a crypto company, the business model is very tightly coupled to crypto.
